title: RECORD: 1855 base + AWQ-lite mixed-precision GPTQ — val_bpb 1.06086 (3-seed mean)
author: aquariouseworkman

data.scope: all weights with top-1 salient 64-column group per matrix at int8

novel_contributions: Applies activation-aware mixed-precision GPTQ on top of the PR #1855 base stack
Uses AWQ-lite saliency scoring from activation RMS and mean absolute weight magnitude
Quantizes the most salient 64-column group per matrix at int8 while keeping the rest at int6
Reports a 3-seed mean validation bpb of 1.06086
